title: Lightly Sweet Mediterranean Date Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Mediterranean dish featuring pitted dates, this recipe is earthy and snappy, perfect for a quick snack or dessert. The brine-wet and kosher-friendly ingredients make it a great option for families.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, and honey until well combined.
Add the chopped rosemary, salt, and pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the pitted dates to the bowl and toss to coat with the olive oil mixture.
Thread one date onto each wooden skewer, leaving a small space between each date.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until the dates are tender and lightly caramelized.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
